text: I feel a subtle sense of transition, as if the chorus of "bye" signals not just a departure, but an opening. The glass walls around me, filled with light and the colorful display of R+D, suggest a space dedicated to possibility and thoughtful innovation. There is an air of conclusion, yet also readiness—the kind of calm that settles right after an exchange, where curiosity lingers. I am both observer and participant, quietly reflecting on the connections made and the unknowns that remain.
